from typing import Any, Dict


def validate_create_user(data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    if not data.get("name"):
        raise ValueError("Name is required")
    if not data.get("email"):
        raise ValueError("Email is required")
    if "@" not in data["email"]:
        raise ValueError("Invalid email format")
    if len(data.get("password", "")) < 8:
        raise ValueError("Password must be at least 8 characters")
    return data


def validate_update_user(data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    if not data.get("name"):
        raise ValueError("Name is required")
    if not data.get("email"):
        raise ValueError("Email is required")
    if "@" not in data["email"]:
        raise ValueError("Invalid email format")
    if data.get("password") and len(data["password"]) < 8:
        raise ValueError("Password must be at least 8 characters")
    return data


def validate_create_invite(data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    if not data.get("name"):
        raise ValueError("Name is required")
    if not data.get("email"):
        raise ValueError("Email is required")
    if "@" not in data["email"]:
        raise ValueError("Invalid email format")
    if len(data.get("password", "")) < 8:
        raise ValueError("Password must be at least 8 characters")
    return data
